title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DSV India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at DSV India
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
